name: The Fool
upright: New beginnings, spontaneity, a leap of faith.
love: A new romance or fresh start. Be open and vulnerable.
career: New job or project. Take the risk.
health: New wellness journey. Trust the process.

name: The Magician
upright: You have all the tools you need. Take action.
love: You attract what you put out. Be confident.
career: Your skills are recognized. Time to shine.
